App Store 折扣追踪是一个开源项目，用于追踪 App Store 应用和: App Store Discounts is an open-source project that tracks price changes for App Store applications and in-app purchases.
基于 GitHub Actions 构建，每 120 分钟自动检查折扣，并通过: Built on GitHub Actions, it automatically checks for discounts every 120 minutes and pushes notifications via RSS, Telegram, and DingTalk.
监控 App 和 App 内购买项目价格: Monitors App and In-App Purchase prices
基于付费应用榜单自动更新追踪列表: Auto-updates tracking list based on paid app rankings
请检查网络连接后重试: Please check your network and try again
在列表页点击收藏按钮添加应用: Click the favorite button on the list page to add apps
追踪 App Store 应用折扣信息，发现限时优惠与价格变动。: Track App Store app discounts, discover limited-time offers and price changes.
自动抓取 App Store 限免与折扣信息，实时掌握优惠动态: Automatically capture App Store free and discounted apps, stay updated on deals in real-time
支持中国大陆、香港、澳门、台湾、美国、土耳其、葡萄牙等地区: Supports China Mainland, Hong Kong, Macau, Taiwan, US, Turkey, Portugal and more
查看应用历史价格走势，不错过任何低价机会: View app price history trends, never miss a low price
展示 App Store 用户评分，帮助筛选高质量应用: Display App Store user ratings, help filter high-quality apps
支持 RSS 订阅，第一时间获取最新折扣推送: Subscribe via RSS to get the latest discount notifications
通过 RSS 阅读器订阅，获取最新限免折扣信息: Subscribe via RSS reader to get the latest free and discounted app info
加入 Telegram 频道，获取实时折扣通知: Join Telegram channel for real-time discount notifications
扫码加入钉钉群组，获取实时折扣通知: Scan to join DingTalk group for real-time discount notifications
查看源代码、提交 Issue 或贡献代码: View source code, submit issues or contribute
查看项目文档，了解更多使用方法: View project docs to learn more about usage
开源的 App Store 折扣信息助手，基于 GitHub Actions 实: An open-source App Store discounts tracker built on GitHub Actions, supporting RSS, Telegram and DingTalk notifications
支持中国大陆、香港、澳门、台湾、美国、土耳其、葡萄牙等地区的 App Store: Supports App Store in China Mainland, Hong Kong, Macau, Taiwan, US, Turkey, Portugal and more
追踪应用本体及 App 内购买项目的价格变化，不错过任何优惠: Track app and in-app purchase price changes, never miss a deal
查看应用历史价格走势图表，识别最佳购买时机: View app price history charts to identify the best time to buy
支持 RSS、Telegram、钉钉多种订阅渠道，实时获取折扣推送: Subscribe via RSS, Telegram, or DingTalk for real-time discount notifications
基于付费排行榜自动发现和更新追踪应用，无需手动添加: Automatically discover and update tracked apps based on paid rankings, no manual adding needed
根据优惠频次自动禁用推送，避免频繁打扰: Auto-disable push notifications based on discount frequency to avoid excessive alerts
支持按应用名称快速过滤，轻松找到目标应用: Quickly filter by app name to easily find target apps
开源项目，代码透明，欢迎社区贡献和参与: Open source project with transparent code, community contributions welcome
